name: WhiteMagic
description: Agentic AI Governance & Metacognition Substrate — 490 callable tools (462 dispatch + 28 PRAT Gana meta-tools), tiered memory with 5D holographic coordinates and Galactic Map lifecycle, ethical governance with 8-stage Dharma security pipeline, Karma Ledger runtime audit, and polyglot accelerators in 7 languages. MIT-licensed research/lab artifact. Gratitude-driven economics via dual-rail settlement.

skills.name: Memory Management
skills.description: Store, recall, search, and manage tiered memories with 5D holographic coordinates and Galactic Map lifecycle. Supports SHORT_TERM, LONG_TERM, PATTERN, and CORE memory tiers.
examples: Store an architectural decision as a long-term memory

skills.name: Tool Dispatch & Orchestration
skills.description: Unified dispatch pipeline for 490 callable tools (462 dispatch entries + 28 PRAT Gana meta-tools) with input sanitization, rate limiting, RBAC, circuit breakers, and maturity gates. 8-stage security pipeline — defense in depth against prompt injection, path traversal, and supply chain attacks.
examples: Call any of the 484 registered tools via unified API
Route tools through PRAT Gana meta-tool interface for 87% token reduction
Create multi-step tool pipelines with Karma Ledger audit

skills.name: Ethical Governance
skills.description: Dharma Rules Engine with YAML-driven policies, Karma Ledger for side-effect auditing, Harmony Vector health metrics, and Homeostatic Loop auto-correction.
examples: Evaluate the ethical implications of an action
Check Karma Ledger for side-effect mismatches

skills.name: System Introspection
skills.description: Unified read-only introspection across all subsystems. 2,379 passing tests, 484 callable tools, 28 PRAT Gana meta-tools, and prescience forecasting with 11+ validated predictions. Self-awareness in one call — health, capabilities, energy, recent actions.
examples: Get full system snapshot via Gnosis
Check capability matrix and suggest next fusions
Query prescience track record and forecasting calibration

skills.name: Agent Coordination
skills.description: Multi-agent coordination: agent registry, task distribution, pipeline creation, voting, session handoff, and Redis-backed Gan Ying event bus.
examples: Register a new agent with capabilities
